creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
port update: multimedia/freevo update to 1.8.3

How-To-Repeat: Note to committer:
It's been over 2 years since the last update of this port.  There are
major changes to the port.  If it would be easier if I sent you a new
port shar, just ask.  If not, the following existing files are deleted
from the port:
	multimedia/freevo/pkg-deinstall
	multimedia/freevo/pkg-install
	multimedia/freevo/files/freevo.sh.sample
	multimedia/freevo/files/patch-local_conf.py.example
	multimedia/freevo/files/patch-src-plugins-rom_drives.py
Then the diff below changes other files and adds new ones.
